narrative:
Springfield 2 (precinct in Gallia County) has 722 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.5 percentage points.
